impact: This gives the supervisor a deterministic recovery target after py_compile or TS1005/TS1109/TS1128 failures: shrink the next daemon task to a tiny syntactic-validity repair, require complete JSON replacements, preflight changed Python files with py_compile before broader validation, and avoid broad contract rewrites or live DevHub automation.
summary: Add daemon-local syntax retry guidance for repeated Python/TypeScript syntax failures.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 3 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
